facebook.caption:
4.5 stars. 435 reviews. For a vegan restaurant in Phu Quoc. That's not luck, that's consistency.

Nhà Hàng Chay NẤM on Đường Nguyễn Trãi is pulling numbers that most seafood spots on the island would envy. Plant-based, local ingredients, 435 people who came back and told the internet about it.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 435 people rated Nhà Hàng Chay NẤM 4.5 stars. Watch what lands on the table and you'll see exactly why. Plant-based Phu Quoc done right.
